case_title: LOOM COMPANY vs. NEXT INTERIORS, A PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOOM COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NEXT INTERIORS, A PARTNERSHIP DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE NGUYEN, MINH H., PARTNER NGUYEN, PIERRE, PARTNER SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-07-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-20-1996
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NEXT INTERIORS, A PARTNERSHIP NGUYEN, PIERRE, PARTNER

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-07-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR A CRC 525 CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT REPORT: PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE A DECLARATION STATING WHEN LAST PAYMENT WILL BE MADE AND WHEN A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GLASSBERG, HAROLD BURTON SUBSTITUTED FOR HARTSOUGH, DOUGLAS JOHN AS ATTORNEY FOR LOOM COMPANY

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEXT INTERIORS, A PARTNERSHIP NGUYEN, PIERRE, PARTNER
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOOM COMPANY NGUYEN, PIERRE, PARTNER
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1996, CONTINUED TO FEB-03-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOOM COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEXT INTERIORS, A PARTNERSHIP NGUYEN, PIERRE, PARTNER $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $118.00 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,648.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-03-1997, CONTINUED TO APR-04-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR JUDGMENT NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MINH H., PARTNER
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LOOM COMPANY
